---
title: "Hello there! 👋🏻"
toc: false
title-block-banner: "#ffffff"
title-block-banner-color: "#111"
page-layout: article
---
:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-9}

Welcome to my website!
My name is Tiago Jacinto, and I'm a lecturer and researcher based in Porto, Portugal. You can learn more about me or just drop an email.

Other places where you can find me:  
[Last.fm](https://www.last.fm/user/taqjac) | [Flickr](https://www.flickr.com/photos/taqjac/)  

I'm also on social media, although I don't use it regularly anymore.  
[Twitter/X](https://www.twitter.com/tiagojacinto_eu) | [Mastodon](https://mastodon.social/@taqjac) | [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/tiagojacinto.eu) | [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/taqjac.bsky.social)  

:::

:::{.g-col-3}
![It's-a-me!](img/legome.jpeg)
:::
:::
